category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP/KN95 mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Myanmar market (MSTRD / MIC).

title.en: China-to-Myanmar PPE Respirator (KN95 / Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入缅甸（KN95）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入緬甸（KN95）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Myanmar import requirements under MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division) and MIC (Myanmar Investment Commission). Covers conformity documentation, national-language labelling, product safety, marking, and key regulatory gaps including the absence of a horizontal RoHS equivalent in Myanmar.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与缅甸进口要求对照，涵盖MSTRD（缅甸标准与测试研究部）及MIC（缅甸投资委员会）相关要求，包括合规文件、国家语言标签、产品安全、标识，以及缅甸缺乏横向RoHS等同规定等关键合规差距。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與緬甸進口要求對照，涵蓋MSTRD（緬甸標準與測試研究部）及MIC（緬甸投資委員會）相關要求，包括合規文件、國家語言標籤、產品安全、標識，以及緬甸缺乏橫向RoHS等同規定等關鍵合規差距。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Myanmar regulatory requirements for PPE are largely voluntary and may change with little published notice. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Myanmar standards, MSTRD certification scope, MIC import rules, and Customs (Yangon/Thilawa or Mandalay overland) practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment. Verified: false — this dataset has not been reviewed by a named human expert.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。缅甸PPE监管要求大多为自愿性质，且可能在几乎没有公开通知的情况下发生变化。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行缅甸标准、MSTRD认证范围、MIC进口规定及海关（仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒陆路）实践。已验证：否——本数据集未经具名人类专家审核。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。緬甸PPE監管要求大多為自願性質，且可能在幾乎沒有公開通知的情況下發生變化。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行緬甸標準、MSTRD認證範圍、MIC進口規定及海關（仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒陸路）實踐。已驗證：否——本數據集未經具名人類專家審核。

answer_first.en: Myanmar's PPE respirator market is lightly regulated: MSTRD sets MS standards (many adopted from IEC/ISO) but most are voluntary. MIC governs foreign investment and import licensing. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) respirators can typically enter Myanmar via Yangon/Thilawa port or Mandalay overland from Yunnan with standard customs documentation and product conformity evidence; MSTRD conformity certification may be requested but is not uniformly enforced. Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS equivalent — hazardous substance restrictions do not apply to PPE via a general product regulation. National-language (Myanmar/Burmese script) labelling is expected for consumer-facing products.
answer_first.zh: 缅甸PPE呼吸器市场监管较宽松：MSTRD制定MS标准（许多采用自IEC/ISO）但大多为自愿性质。MIC负责外商投资及进口许可。中国KN95（GB 2626）呼吸器通常可凭标准海关文件及产品合规证明，经仰光/迪拉瓦港口或曼德勒陆路（云南）进入缅甸；MSTRD合规认证可能被要求但并非统一强制执行。缅甸没有横向RoHS等同规定——危险物质限制不通过一般产品法规适用于PPE。面向消费者的产品预期需有缅甸语（缅文字体）标签。
answer_first.zht: 緬甸PPE呼吸器市場監管較寬鬆：MSTRD制定MS標準（許多採用自IEC/ISO）但大多為自願性質。MIC負責外商投資及進口許可。中國KN95（GB 2626）呼吸器通常可憑標準海關文件及產品合規證明，經仰光/迪拉瓦港口或曼德勒陸路（雲南）進入緬甸；MSTRD合規認證可能被要求但並非統一強制執行。緬甸沒有橫向RoHS等同規定——危險物質限制不通過一般產品法規適用於PPE。面向消費者的產品預期需有緬甸語（緬文字體）標籤。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on material regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
